zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton於大約1046年出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯時，他的父親Landry de Senlis53歲，母親Ermengarde49歲。他於1090年與Matilda of Huntingdon在英國亨廷格多史爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1066年登記服兵役。他去世於大約1111年在法國布格尼艾福可斯-庫斯-素-洛易享年67歲，埋葬在法國布格-福朗-可特艾尼艾福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton于大约1046年出生在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯时，他的父亲Landry de Senlis53岁，母亲Ermengarde49岁。他于1090年与Matilda of Huntingdon在英国亨廷格多史爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1066年登记服兵役。他去世于大约1111年在法国布格尼艾福可斯-庫斯-素-洛易享年67岁，埋葬在法国布格-福朗-可特艾尼艾福。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Senlis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Sales
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Efren, Alberto, Francisco, Manuel, Camilo, Carlos, Fernando, Juan, Juanita, Mario, Ofelia.

English: variant of Sale with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. The Middle English plural form was probably often in variation with the singular form. The surname is uncommon in southwestern England but may derive there from Zeals (Wiltshire), and also from the plural form of Old English sealh ‘willow’; see Seal .
Catalan, Spanish, and French (Occitan): habitational name from any of the places called Sales, like Sales de Llierca (Catalonia), from the plural of   Sala   1. Compare   De Sales  .

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton was born about 1046, in Calvados, Normandy, France, his father, Landry de Senlis, was 53 and his mother, Ermengarde, was 49. He married Matilda of Huntingdon in 1090, in Huntingdonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1066. He died about 1111, in Cosne-Cours-sur-Loire, Nièvre, Burgundy, France, at the age of 67, and was buried in Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton est né environ 1046, à Calvados, Normandie, France, son père, Landry de Senlis, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde, avait 49 ans. Il a épousé Matilda of Huntingdon en 1090, à Huntingdonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1066. Il est décédé environ 1111, à Cosne-Cours-sur-Loire, Nièvre, Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton um 1046 in Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Landry de Senlis 53 und seine Mutter Ermengarde 49. Er hat 1090 in Huntingdonshire, England Matilda of Huntingdon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1066 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb um 1111 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Cosne-Cours-sur-Loire, Nièvre, Burgund, Frankreich und wurde in Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton è nato il circa 1046 nel Calvados, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Landry de Senlis, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Ermengarde, aveva 49 anni. Lui sposato Matilda of Huntingdon nel 1090, nel Huntingdonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1066. Morì circa 1111, nel Cosne-Cours-sur-Loire, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northamptonが約1046年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスで生まれた時，父Landry de Senlisは53歳，母Ermengardeは49歳であった。1090年にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアでMatilda of Huntingdonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1066年に兵役登録をした。彼は約1111年にフランスボウルゴグンニevアコスネ-コウルス-スル-ロイアーで67歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeニevアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton(이)가 대략 1046년 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Landry de Senlis(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermengarde(은)는 49세였다. 그는 1090년 영국 헌틴그도실르에서 Matilda of Huntingdon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1066년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 대략 1111년 프랑스 부르고그니 니e브르 코스니-쿠르스-수-로이르에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 니e브르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton nasceu aproximadamente 1046, em Calvados, Normandie, França, seu pai, Landry de Senlis, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde, tinha 49 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda of Huntingdon em 1090, em Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1066. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1111, em Cosne-Cours-sur-Loire, Nièvre, Bourgogne, França, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton родился около 1046 г. в местности калвадос, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Landry de Senlis было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde, 49. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda of Huntingdon в 1090 г. в местности хантингдоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1066 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер около 1111 г. в местности косне-коурс-сур-лоир, ниeвр, бургогн, Франция в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности ниeвр, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon I de Senlis 1st Earl of Huntingdon-Northampton nació aproximadamente 1046, en Calvados, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Landry de Senlis, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Ermengarde, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Matilda of Huntingdon en 1090, en Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1066. Murió aproximadamente 1111, en Cosne-Cours-sur-Loire, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.
